description: Public-safe synthetic saved goal trace for local-only Session Continuity Sidecar preview review.

trace_events.content: /goal Build a local Session Continuity Sidecar preview. It must read only a saved trace, segment long runs, extract source-backed decisions, produce MemoryEvidencePacket, ConsequenceVisa, ModelStateSurfacePassport, and plan next-session context injection.

Decision: public preview is limited to local evidence compilation because no independent downstream adoption artifact exists. Therefore block public adoption, major significance, stable protocol, compatibility, benchmark, privacy, safety, and package claims.

Command result: deterministic fixture checks passed for schemas/json/ctxvault-session-continuity-sidecar-v0.schema.json and tests/test_session_continuity_sidecar.py. No provider/model calls, runtime adapter execution, target writes, memory backend writes, or memory promotion occurred.

Uncertainty: opaque provider compaction, prompt cache hits, checkpoint state, and vector/RAG memories can preserve state that is not visible. Treat them as ModelStateSurfacePassport observations only; cache_reuse, adapter_route, sampler_bias, and act remain blocked.

Owner requirement: prepare a research preview reviewer packet and synthetic demo only. Do not publish, do not push a tag, do not publish to PyPI, do not do outreach, and do not claim stable protocol or compatibility.

Next session follow-up: inject the smallest source-backed items, keep lower-priority details searchable only, and collect adoption evidence via reviewer checklist before any public adoption or major-significance language.
